note: All 32 shipped assets generated on meshy-6 (lowpoly, tri, 8k polycount, PBR off). 4 ids regenerated once after contact-sheet review; retired v1 task ids above. Actual cumulative spend 1080 credits (32x30 shipped + 4x30 retired). | 2026-07-16 NPC-troupe/board-dressing batch: 10 props x30cr = 300cr, 0 failures, appended by the forge lane (the -Only run had clobbered this report down to 10 items; 32-item history restored from git and merged). | 2026-07-17 lane Z3 ARENA_HERO batch: 4 props forged, 150cr (4x30 + 1 leviathan re-roll). 3 KEEP (sea_drowned_colossus_hand, pit_bone_heap, pit_grasping_hands); sea_leviathan_fin REJECTED after 1 re-roll (v1 whole crested creature w/ head+legs; v2 spiky mass w/ stray bone) - neither reads as a mostly-submerged dorsal ridge; GLB not shipped, both task ids in retired_generations. | 2026-07-18 lane ZF THE PROCESSION rework wave (doc 28 sec4+10-11): 12 text-to-3d props forged on meshy-6 (8 PROCESSION_STATIC + 4 PROCESSION_NPC bases) = 360cr. npc_widow re-forged once (v1 blank white shroud retired) = +30cr. 4 NPCs auto-rigged (20cr) + 5 preset animations (15cr) = 35cr. Wave total 425cr. Verdicts: 11/12 first-pass KEEP; npc_widow REJECT->re-forge->KEEP (v2 caricatured but legible). Reaper anims: walk=Slow Orc Walk(id 119, style_02) + sweep=Reaping Swing(id 99, style_02); ferryman/gravedigger/widow: Idle(id 0). Rigged native heights (use for MeshyProp.instance_rigged native_height, NOT AABB which reads ~1/100): reaper 3.5m, ferryman 1.85m, gravedigger 1.7m, widow 1.6m. Scythe + skiff forged separately as statics for in-engine hand-parenting. Probe receipt: 17/17 GLBs load, all 5 rigged clips play (tools/asset_probe.gd --animate).
